subcodes.first_line: O thou imprisoned one! Like unto Majnún art thou, enchanted by the true Laylí, captivated and enraptured by the spiritual Beloved - this is the path of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسجون لیلای حقیقی را مجنونی و معشوق معنوی را مجذوب و مفتون این راه راه عشق
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
